leads.summary: Leander ISD: artificial turf replacement for football/soccer and baseball/softball field(s); board approved the item (per board minutes, February 5, 2026).
leads.evidence_quote: ura Marques: In favor, Nekosi Nelson: In favor, Anna Smith: In favor. C. OPERATIONS 1. Consider Approval of Bond Oversight Committee Recommendation to Reallocate Bond Funds for the Replacement of Artificial Turf at AC Bible and Monroe Regional Stadiums I move that the Board approve the Bond Oversight Committee's recommendation to reallocate up to $1,600,000 from 2023 Bond Project Line Item: Baseball & Soft
